title: MFSMP 2
body:
Modpack grouping several mods known to the general public. 

Like the previous one (MFSMP),  MFSMP 2 group some popular mods there is less than 200 mods for this pack since i wanted to do a lighweighted modpack and once again without quest.

in this modpack you can find:

  -Tech mod for resources's mass production.

  -Magic to make fun spell to travel long distance easily.

  -Storage mods in addition to the tech because vannilla chest lack of inventory slots.

  -Vanilla + cause some mods are in just to improve QoL* and exploration.

  -Exploration mod adding lot of structures and biomes whithout adding much item or modded blocks.

Created for fun as always.

* QoL : quality of life

Recommended RAM on Client: Minimum 6GB ( 8GB preferred) .

Recommended RAM on Server: 8GB or more dont go higher than 12GB. It doesn't change much and could make performances issues. (server file WIP)

 

Mods list: (could change a bit with future versions)q
